inventory.label: hazelnut (grey squirrel's west stores, partially consumed)
inventory.notes: shell texture not local; implies grey squirrel ranges west of current mapped territory; small piece eaten at corridor east end — remainder intact; now serving as evidence of grey squirrel range rather than supply

identity_notes: the grey-brown squirrel returned as a trader, not a rival
trade executed: pine nut given, hazelnut received — first inventory item
the hazelnut is from western stores; implies the grey squirrel ranges further west than the boundary suggests
the east boundary is now also a channel; confrontation line and trade channel can be the same place
heat avoided by routing through west canopy — the ranging produced a map, not just food
shade corridor found west of east site; new waypoint established on territory map
the migration column tracked directly over the shade corridor — the waypoint sits on a known migration line; others already use this ground
rain reveals drainage: the shade corridor channels water east toward the boundary — the corridor is a drainage line as well as a migration line
the shade corridor is also a seed delivery system: drainage deposits seeds where the grade levels — seedling clusters at three points confirm it
marked the corridor midpoint on territory map; seedlings will recur here in wet seasons
hazelnut partially consumed at the corridor's east end — spent on understanding, not crisis
held the hazelnut fragment in corridor light and addressed it directly — the shell carries more information than the nut did; put it back as evidence, not supply
a woodpecker's even intervals served as a pace counter mid-run — three body-lengths per strike; two west sections measured precisely without approximation
storm caught mid-run; corridor provided shelter and cached seeds at the midpoint — the hazelnut stayed; the corridor proved its value as infrastructure under pressure
post-storm emergence on corridor dead wood — ate while completing the interrupted mapping run; western boundary now complete; hazelnut untouched; corridor delivered food and map on the same morning

inventory.label: hazelnut (grey squirrel's west stores, partially consumed)
inventory.notes: shell texture not local; implies grey squirrel ranges west of current mapped territory; small piece eaten at corridor east end — remainder intact; now serving as evidence of grey squirrel range rather than supply

inventory.label: seeds from stag browsing (shade corridor midpoint)
inventory.notes: fell from branch browsed by stag at the corridor midpoint waypoint; narrow leaf-scar, unfamiliar species — not in west territory, not in any mapped range; implies the stag's feeding ground lies outside the current map in an unknown direction
